title: 帝王賞の後に・四神相応

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After a solid performance in the Teio Sho,
Copano Rickey feels like she's making clear
progress.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But feng shui dictates that the Four Guardians
must be in equilibrium. Only when the four racers
who represent them are in balance will races truly
spark. Thus, Hokko Tarumae's presence is
essential.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Presently, the qi flow that connects Hokko
Tarumae to her hometown, Tomakomai, has been
disrupted. The best way to mend it is with a race
in the Tohoku region, where it is easy for her fans
to gather.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thus, Copano Rickey sets her sights on the Mile
Championship Nambu Hai, hoping that it will help
her rival get back on her feet.
